repositories.publicRole: Canonical launcher channel, pack update, website download, and release-manifest metadata.
Core native runtime source, Native Loader source, PackOS integration, diagnostics, contracts, and native platform release assets.
Official developer preview SDK source: templates, samples, Gradle plugin, schema files, and public authoring docs.
Standalone runtime source, runtime contracts, runtime modules, runtime PackOS bridge, showcase support, and standalone addon compatibility surface.
All public addon module source in one browsable modules repo, with release assets for native addon packages, NeoForge jars, and standalone jars.
Official Ashfall Native Edition pack source and metadata for launcher pack updates. Consumes .echo-addon artifacts from ECHO-Modules.
Official Ashfall NeoForge Edition pack source and metadata. Consumes -neoforge.jar artifacts from ECHO-Modules.
Official Ashfall Standalone Edition pack source and metadata. Consumes -standalone.jar artifacts from ECHO-Modules.
Launcher app source, installer releases, auto-update feed, and Release Index catalog integration for official ECHO modpacks.
Addon creation app for Native Platform and Standalone Runtime addons, with SDK template integration.
Developer operations app for release validation, manifest checks, SDK metadata, and public alpha publishing workflows.
Official public download hub, SDK landing surface, docs entry point, and GitHub Release asset link surface.
